fileNodes.summary: Defines the release pipeline data model — pipelines composed of ordered stages with triggers and actions (including phased rollouts) that progressively promote feature versions across environments.

fileNodes.name: signals.py
fileNodes.summary: Declares the Django dispatch signals used across the features app, such as the feature-flag-went-live event.

fileNodes.name: tasks.py
fileNodes.summary: Asynchronous tasks for the features app, primarily building and dispatching feature-state-change webhook payloads and deleting features.

fileNodes.name: dataclasses.py
fileNodes.summary: Internal data-transfer objects for feature versioning — change sets and conflict descriptors used when publishing flag and segment-override changes.

fileNodes.name: exceptions.py
fileNodes.summary: Exception hierarchy for feature versioning errors, including disallowed direct feature-state writes and attempts to modify a live version.

fileNodes.name: managers.py
fileNodes.summary: Custom Django manager for EnvironmentFeatureVersion that resolves the latest published versions per environment via a raw SQL query.

fileNodes.name: models.py
fileNodes.summary: Core feature versioning models — EnvironmentFeatureVersion (immutable published versions of an environment's feature states) and VersionChangeSet (deferred change sets with conflict detection).

fileNodes.name: permissions.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF permission classes gating access to environment feature versions and their feature states based on environment and tag-scoped permissions.

fileNodes.name: receivers.py
fileNodes.summary: Signal receivers wiring feature-version lifecycle events to side effects — cloning prior states, rebuilding environment documents, triggering webhooks, and writing audit logs.

fileNodes.name: schemas.py
fileNodes.summary: Marshmallow schemas serialising environment feature versions and their feature states into webhook payload data.

fileNodes.name: signals.py
fileNodes.summary: Declares the Django dispatch signal fired when an environment feature version is published.

fileNodes.name: tasks.py
fileNodes.summary: Asynchronous tasks driving feature versioning — enabling/disabling v2 versioning, creating initial versions, dispatching version webhooks, publishing scheduled change sets, and emitting audit logs.

fileNodes.name: urls.py
fileNodes.summary: URL routing for the feature versioning API, wiring environment feature version and feature-state viewsets to nested routes.

fileNodes.name: versioning_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Business-logic layer for feature versioning — resolving live feature states/versions and applying flag and segment-override updates, branching between v1 (direct state) and v2 (versioned) semantics.

fileNodes.name: views.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF viewsets exposing the feature versioning API — listing/creating/publishing environment feature versions and managing the feature states nested under a version.

fileNodes.name: exceptions.py
fileNodes.summary: Exception hierarchy for the change-request workflow, covering unapproved commits, self-approval, and deletion of committed change requests.

fileNodes.name: models.py
fileNodes.summary: Change-request workflow models — ChangeRequest with approval/commit lifecycle, ChangeRequestApproval, and group assignment, including audit logging and email notifications.

fileNodes.name: tasks.py
fileNodes.summary: Asynchronous tasks for the segments app — deleting a segment and recording a segment-deleted audit log entry.

fileNodes.name: results_query.py
fileNodes.summary: Builds the parameterised ClickHouse SQL that computes per-variant metric aggregates (count/sum/sum-of-squares) and decodes result rows into VariantStats for statistical inference.

fileNodes.name: serializers.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF serializers for warehouse connections, metrics, experiments and their exposures/results, including validation of metric definitions, variant uniqueness, and feature compatibility.

fileNodes.name: services.py
fileNodes.summary: Core business-logic layer: feature-flag gating, ClickHouse client/queries for exposures and metric stats, results summarisation with SRM and inference, experiment status transitions, and audit-log creation.

fileNodes.name: stats.py
fileNodes.summary: Pure statistics helpers: two-sample lift inference with confidence interval and chance-to-win, plus a sample-ratio-mismatch (SRM) chi-squared p-value, implemented without scipy.

fileNodes.name: tasks.py
fileNodes.summary: Asynchronous task-processor tasks that sync environment keys to ingestion and recompute experiment exposures and results, recording refresh/failure state on the computation models.

fileNodes.name: types.py
fileNodes.summary: TypedDict definitions for metric-definition payloads, per-experiment metric results, and Snowflake warehouse configuration used across serializers and services.

fileNodes.name: urls.py
fileNodes.summary: Top-level URL routing for the experimentation app, wiring the warehouse-connection viewset into the environment API.

fileNodes.name: views.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF viewsets for warehouse connections, experiments, experiment metrics, and metrics — handling CRUD, connection testing, status transitions, and exposures/results refresh endpoints.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Empty package marker for the experimentation Django app, which houses A/B experiment, metric, and data-warehouse connection features.

fileNodes.name: constants.py
fileNodes.summary: App-wide constants for the experimentation feature: feature-flag keys, the SDK exposure event name, refresh intervals, and statistical sample-size floors used in results inference.

fileNodes.name: dataclasses.py
fileNodes.summary: Internal data-transfer dataclasses for warehouse stats, exposure buckets/timeseries, and metric result aggregates passed between the services and query layers.

fileNodes.name: experiment_urls.py
fileNodes.summary: URL routing that registers the experiment and nested experiment-metric viewsets under the environment-scoped API.

fileNodes.name: ingestion_sync_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Thin Redis-cluster client wrapper that pushes environment API keys to (and removes them from) the events-ingestion service so warehouse ingestion knows which environments to accept.

fileNodes.name: metric_definitions.py
fileNodes.summary: Versioned validator registry for metric definition payloads, dispatching to per-version validators (currently v1) to enforce the event/aggregation schema.

fileNodes.name: metric_urls.py
fileNodes.summary: URL routing registering the environment-scoped metric viewset for the experimentation API.

fileNodes.name: models.py
fileNodes.summary: Django ORM models for the experimentation domain: warehouse connections, experiments and their computations, exposures, results, and metrics with their aggregation/direction enums.

fileNodes.name: permissions.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF permission classes gating warehouse-connection and experiment endpoints on the relevant feature flag and environment-admin rights.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package entry point for the DynamoDB environments subpackage, re-exporting the wrapper classes, DTO types, and capacity exception for convenient import elsewhere.

fileNodes.name: constants.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines DynamoDB table key names, document key prefixes, and capacity-related constants shared across the environments DynamoDB wrappers.

fileNodes.name: services.py
fileNodes.summary: Business-logic layer that migrates project environments to the v2 DynamoDB document model, paginating identity overrides within a capacity budget and writing the resulting changeset.

fileNodes.name: types.py
fileNodes.summary: Dataclass DTOs for DynamoDB project metadata and identity-override changesets, including the DynamoProjectMetadata record that tracks identity migration lifecycle state.

fileNodes.name: utils.py
fileNodes.summary: Helper utilities for DynamoDB documents: estimating serialised document size, JSON-encoding Decimals, and building/parsing v2 identity-override document keys.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package entry point for the DynamoDB wrappers subpackage, re-exporting the environment API key, environment, and identity wrapper classes.

fileNodes.name: base.py
fileNodes.summary: Abstract base wrapper providing shared DynamoDB table access (lazy boto3 resource, table-name resolution, enablement check) and paginated scan/query iteration for concrete wrappers.

fileNodes.name: environment_api_key_wrapper.py
fileNodes.summary: DynamoDB wrapper for persisting and deleting environment API key documents using batched writes.

fileNodes.name: environment_wrapper.py
fileNodes.summary: DynamoDB wrappers for environment documents covering both the legacy and v2 schemas, handling optional compression, identity-override read/write/delete, and emitting document size and compression-ratio metrics.

fileNodes.name: exceptions.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the CapacityBudgetExceeded exception raised when a DynamoDB migration scan exhausts its allotted read-capacity budget.

fileNodes.name: identity_wrapper.py
fileNodes.summary: DynamoDB wrapper for identity documents providing CRUD, UUID lookups, capacity-bounded paginated iteration, search, and engine-based segment-membership resolution for an identity.

fileNodes.name: metrics.py
fileNodes.summary: Declares Prometheus histogram metrics for DynamoDB environment document size and compression ratio used by the environment wrappers.

fileNodes.name: dataclasses.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the EnvironmentFeatureOverridesData DTO that tallies segment and identity override counts per feature for an environment.

fileNodes.name: features_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Business-logic service that aggregates per-feature override counts for an environment, dispatching to either the core (relational) or edge (DynamoDB) data source depending on the project's identity overrides backend.

fileNodes.name: mappers.py
fileNodes.summary: Maps DynamoDB identity documents into ClickHouse row tuples, flattening and coercing trait values for the segment-membership backfill pipeline.

fileNodes.name: metrics.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines Prometheus counters and histograms tracking segment-membership backfill and refresh task volume, duration, and failures.

fileNodes.name: models.py
fileNodes.summary: Django model storing per-segment, per-environment membership counts produced by the ClickHouse-backed refresh task.

fileNodes.name: services.py
fileNodes.summary: Business logic for segment-membership counting: feature-flag gating, refresh enqueueing, ClickHouse cursor management, and computing per-segment membership counts via translated segment SQL.

fileNodes.name: tasks.py
fileNodes.summary: Async tasks that backfill DynamoDB identities into ClickHouse and refresh per-project segment-membership counts, persisting results to SegmentMembershipCount.

fileNodes.name: admin.py
fileNodes.summary: Django admin registrations and inline editors for Segment, SegmentRule, and Condition models.

fileNodes.name: models.py
fileNodes.summary: Core segment data model defining Segment, SegmentRule, Condition, and WhitelistedSegment with versioning, cloning, custom managers, and audit-log integration.

fileNodes.name: permissions.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF permission class enforcing project-scoped view and object permissions for segment endpoints.

fileNodes.name: serializers.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF serializers for segments, nested rules and conditions, with validation for project segment limits, rule/condition limits, metadata, and clone operations.

fileNodes.name: services.py
fileNodes.summary: Business logic for soft-deleting segments with audit logging and deep-copying segment rules and conditions during clone operations.

fileNodes.name: urls.py
fileNodes.summary: URL routing for the segments app, wiring the lookup-by-uuid view into the URL conf.

fileNodes.name: views.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF viewset and view exposing segment CRUD, associated-features listing, clone, soft-delete, and identity-filtered segment lookup endpoints.

fileNodes.name: constants.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines app-wide constant values for the feature import/export module, such as status flags (processing, success, failed) and the maximum upload file size.

fileNodes.name: mappers.py
fileNodes.summary: Maps exported feature data dictionaries back into Feature model instances scoped to a project during the import process.

fileNodes.name: models.py
fileNodes.summary: Django models persisting feature export jobs, feature import jobs, and the Flagsmith-on-Flagsmith feature export, including their status and serialized JSON payloads.

fileNodes.name: permissions.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF permission classes governing who may create exports, download exports, upload imports, and list import/export jobs based on environment, project, and organisation admin rights.

fileNodes.name: serializers.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF serializers that validate and create feature export/import jobs, enforce upload file-size limits, and dispatch the async Celery tasks that perform the work.

fileNodes.name: services.py
fileNodes.summary: Business-logic service that overwrites an existing feature's states and multivariate options for a given environment when importing feature data.

fileNodes.name: tasks.py
fileNodes.summary: Celery/recurring tasks that perform feature exports and imports for an environment, retire stalled jobs, clear stale records, and generate the Flagsmith-on-Flagsmith export.

fileNodes.name: types.py
fileNodes.summary: TypedDict definitions describing the JSON shape of exported feature data and its multivariate option entries, used as DTOs across the import/export flow.

fileNodes.name: views.py
fileNodes.summary: DRF API views and endpoints for creating feature exports, uploading imports, downloading export payloads, fetching the Flagsmith-on-Flagsmith export, and listing import/export jobs.

fileNodes.name: .env-ci
fileNodes.summary: Environment variable defaults loaded during continuous-integration test runs for the Flagsmith API.

fileNodes.name: .env-local
fileNodes.summary: Environment variable defaults for local development of the Flagsmith API server and database.

fileNodes.name: Makefile
fileNodes.summary: Build and developer-workflow automation defining 28 targets for installing dependencies, linting, type-checking, running tests, managing Docker services, applying Django migrations, serving the app, and generating OpenAPI SDK and integration client types.

fileNodes.name: Procfile
fileNodes.summary: Process-type declaration defining the release migration step and the gunicorn-served web process for the Flagsmith WSGI application.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Developer guide for the Flagsmith API covering local setup, testing, metrics, structured logging, feature flags, migrations, typing, and the Django app architecture conventions.

fileNodes.name: openapi-filter-flagsmith-sdk.yml
fileNodes.summary: openapi-format filter rules used when generating the published Flagsmith SDK OpenAPI schema, controlling operationIds, inverse tags, and unused-component pruning.

fileNodes.name: openapi-filter-grafana.yaml
fileNodes.summary: openapi-format filter rules for trimming the upstream Grafana OpenAPI spec down to the operations needed to generate the Grafana integration client types.

fileNodes.name: openapi-filter-launchdarkly.yaml
fileNodes.summary: openapi-format filter rules for trimming the upstream LaunchDarkly OpenAPI spec down to the operations needed to generate the LaunchDarkly integration client types.

fileNodes.name: pyproject.toml
fileNodes.summary: Central Python project manifest declaring dependencies and optional extras and configuring the build backend, uv package sources, Ruff linting/formatting, coverage, pytest, and Mypy strict type checking with Django/DRF stubs.

fileNodes.name: 00__packages.config
fileNodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension installing OS-level yum packages (git, xmlsec1, xmlsec1-openssl) required for SAML/XML signing support on the deployment host.

fileNodes.name: 01__upgrade_pip.config
fileNodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension that upgrades pip in the application virtualenv before dependency installation during deployment.

fileNodes.name: 02__collectstatic.config
fileNodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk container command running Django collectstatic to gather static assets during deployment.

fileNodes.name: 03__django.config
fileNodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk option settings defining the WSGI entry path (app/wsgi.py) and static file mapping for the Django Python container.

fileNodes.name: 04__wsgi_custom.config
fileNodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension that injects a custom Apache/httpd config enabling WSGIPassAuthorization and gzip (mod_deflate) compression for text and JSON responses.

fileNodes.name: .ebignore
fileNodes.summary: Empty Elastic Beanstalk ignore file controlling which files are excluded from the deployment bundle uploaded by the EB CLI.

fileNodes.name: .nvmrc
fileNodes.summary: Node Version Manager pin specifying the Node.js version used by tooling in the API directory.

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Ignore patterns for the Understand-Anything codebase analysis tool, excluding generated, vendored, and irrelevant paths from knowledge-graph scanning.

fileNodes.name: config.json
fileNodes.summary: Configuration for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, setting the output language for generated knowledge-graph content.
